items.title: Islamic State-linked women arrive home in Australia from Syria
items.dek: A group of nine women and children has landed in Melbourne while another woman and her child arrived in Sydney.
items.body: A group of nine women and children has landed in Melbourne while another woman and her child arrived in Sydney.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Top BJP leader's aide shot dead in violence after Indian state election
items.dek: Chandranath Rath was personal assistant to Suvendu Adhikari, front runner to become West Bengal's new chief minister.
items.body: Chandranath Rath was personal assistant to Suvendu Adhikari, front runner to become West Bengal's new chief minister.
